title: Civil Engineering Department Overview
content: The Civil Engineering department at RGMCET was established in 2008. It offers B.Tech in Civil Engineering with an intake of 120 and M.Tech in Computer Aided Structural Engineering with an intake of 18. The department provides quality education supported by experienced faculty, modern laboratories, and strong infrastructure.
text_for_embedding: Civil Engineering Department Overview | Category: departments | Subcategory: overview | Department: ce | Keywords: RGMCET civil engineering, civil department overview, BTech civil intake, MTech structural engineering, civil engineering RGMCET | The Civil Engineering department at RGMCET was established in 2008. It offers B.Tech in Civil Engineering with an intake of 120 and M.Tech in Computer Aided Structural Engineering with an intake of 18. The department provides quality education supported by experienced faculty, modern laboratories, and strong infrastructure.

title: Civil Engineering Vision and Mission
content: The department aims to provide value-based civil engineering education that produces socially responsible professionals. It focuses on innovation, research orientation, leadership, teamwork, and strong industry collaboration.

It focuses on innovation, research orientation, leadership, teamwork, and strong industry collaboration.

title: Electrical and Electronics Engineering Department Overview

content: The Electrical and Electronics Engineering department provides well-equipped laboratories including power systems, power electronics, control systems, electrical machines, and measurements labs. title: Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) Department Overview
content: The Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) program in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was introduced in the academic year 2022–2023 with an intake of 60 students. Artificial Intelligence enables machines to simulate human intelligence and solve complex problems using algorithms and data. Machine Learning focuses on building systems that can learn patterns from data and make predictions automatically. The program prepares students with strong foundations in artificial intelligence, machine learning, data analytics, and intelligent system development for modern industry applications.
text_for_embedding:
Department: Computer Science and Engineering
Specialization: CSE (AI & ML)
Also known as: cse aiml, ai ml, artificial intelligence machine learning

Title: Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) Department Overview

The Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) program in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was introduced in the academic year 2022–2023 with an intake of 60 students. Artificial Intelligence enables machines to simulate human intelligence and solve complex problems using algorithms and data. Machine Learning focuses on building systems that can learn patterns from data and make predictions automatically. The program prepares students with strong foundations in artificial intelligence, machine learning, data analytics, and intelligent system development for modern industry applications.

title: CSE (AI & ML) Vision and Mission
content: Vision: To develop competent professionals in the field of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning contributing globally to the benefit of industry and society. Mission: To develop state of the art academic and infrastructural facilities with modern equipment and learning resources to produce self sustainable professionals. To collaborate with industry and research laboratories through projects and internships enabling students to explore various directions of learning. To equip students with interdisciplinary skill sets required to build intelligent systems and achieve successful careers in the global marketplace.

title: CSE (AI & ML) Program Outcomes
content: Graduates of the CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) program will be able to design, develop, implement, and deploy intelligent systems and machine learning models to solve real-world problems in domains such as healthcare, finance, and IoT. Students gain proficiency in AI techniques including computer vision, natural language processing, and reinforcement learning. The program also focuses on building intelligent robotic systems and developing ethical AI solutions considering fairness, transparency, and societal impact.

title: Computer Science and Engineering and Business Systems Department Overview
content: The Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) program in Computer Science and Engineering and Business Systems (CSE&BS) was introduced in the academic year 2020–2021 with a sanctioned intake of 60 students. The program is designed to combine core computer science knowledge with business and management skills. It focuses on the practical implementation of computer science concepts in real-world business applications. Students gain strong foundations in computing while also developing knowledge in humanities, economics, management sciences, and ethical values.

Students gain strong foundations in computing while also developing knowledge in humanities, economics, management sciences, and ethical values.

To establish a center of technological knowledge supporting data creators, providers, and users across industry and society.

title: Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) Department Overview
content: The Bachelor of Technology program in Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in Cyber Security was introduced in the academic year 2022–2023. The program focuses on developing expertise in secure systems, cyber defense mechanisms, and information protection technologies. Students gain hands-on practical experience in secure system design, network security, cryptography, web security, and cyber risk management. The curriculum also emphasizes legal, behavioral, and ethical aspects of cybersecurity to prepare graduates capable of protecting digital infrastructure and developing secure computing solutions.
text_for_embedding:
Department: Computer Science and Engineering
Specialization: CSE (Cyber Security)

Title: Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) Department Overview

The Bachelor of Technology program in Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in Cyber Security was introduced in the academic year 2022–2023. The program focuses on developing expertise in secure systems, cyber defense mechanisms, and information protection technologies. Students gain hands-on practical experience in secure system design, network security, cryptography, web security, and cyber risk management. The curriculum also emphasizes legal, behavioral, and ethical aspects of cybersecurity to prepare graduates capable of protecting digital infrastructure and developing secure computing solutions.

title: CSE Cyber Security Vision and Mission
content: Vision: To become a partner of choice for Cyber and Information Security by implementing comprehensive data protection strategies and contributing to the development of secure digital systems for organizations and society. Mission: To introduce best practices of cyber and information security protection, integrate them with organizational processes, empower organizations to manage and mitigate risks, and help them become globally competitive.

title: CSE Cyber Security Programs and Course Structure
content: The department offers B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in Cyber Security. The program spans four years with eight semesters and includes courses covering secure coding, network security, cryptography, database security, web security, cyber risk management, and digital forensics. The curriculum provides practical laboratory experience and project-based learning in cybersecurity technologies.

Title: CSE Cyber Security Programs and Course Structure

The department offers B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in Cyber Security. The program spans four years with eight semesters and includes courses covering secure coding, network security, cryptography, database security, web security, cyber risk management, and digital forensics. The curriculum provides practical laboratory experience and project-based learning in cybersecurity technologies.

title: CSE Cyber Security Faculty
content: The Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) department is supported by qualified faculty members specializing in cybersecurity, secure software development, network security, and information assurance.

The Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) department is supported by qualified faculty members specializing in cybersecurity, secure software development, network security, and information assurance.

title: CSE Cyber Security Program Outcomes
content: Graduates of the Computer Science and Engineering Cyber Security program will develop the ability to analyze and design secure computing systems. Students will understand networking, cryptography, web security, and database management with strong adherence to secure software development practices. Graduates will be capable of developing strategies for protecting digital assets, managing cyber risks, and implementing cybersecurity solutions for organizations and individuals.
